title: Use the event_loop fixture
body:
This PR updates the test fixtures to explicitly consume the event_loop fixture provided by pytest-asyncio. By declaring the event_loop parameter on the ds_client fixture, pytest will manage the asyncio event loop lifecycle more reliably across tests, reducing the risk of nested loop usage or runtime warnings.

No production code changes are involved; only test scaffolding is adjusted to align with pytest-asyncio best practices referenced in the related discussion (see PR description link in the PR body).

step_plan.summary: Adopt the event_loop fixture in the ds_client test fixture to ensure pytest-asyncio manages the asyncio loop lifecycle consistently across tests.

steps.operation: Modify ds_client fixture to accept the event_loop fixture
steps.reason: To delegate event loop lifecycle management to pytest-asyncio by consuming the event_loop fixture, aligning with best practices and preventing potential nested loop warnings.
steps.side_effects: Test suite will depend on pytest-asyncio's event_loop fixture; ensure pytest-asyncio is configured in the test environment; minor adjustments may be needed if tests reference the loop directly; no production code changes; run tests to confirm there are no regressions
